summary: Comprehensive testing of IKTHEES PARTNERS admin backend system completed successfully. All core admin functionalities including authentication, CRUD operations, and public APIs are working correctly. Frontend admin interface tested with excellent results for login, dashboard, portfolio management, and navigation.

design_issues.issue: Some admin pages show loading spinner briefly during data fetching, which is normal behavior
design_issues.note: This is expected behavior for async data loading

passed_tests: Portfolio CRUD operations (Create, Read, Update, Delete)
Pitch submissions management with status updates
Public API endpoints (portfolio, team, advisors, insights, stats)
